payload.title: Google Finance new app launch
payload.fact: Google launched a new Android app for Google Finance as it comes out of beta.
supporting_evidence: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app

payload.title: Google.org $5 million grant to Obrii
payload.fact: Google.org provided a $5 million grant to scale Obrii, Ukraine's national AI job platform.
supporting_evidence: org is providing a $5 million grant to scale Obrii, Ukraine’s national AI job platform

payload.title: Henry County Public Schools use Gemini for Education
payload.fact: Henry County Public Schools in Kentucky used Gemini for Education to close critical achievement gaps.
supporting_evidence: Henry County Public Schools in Kentucky successfully closed critical achievement gaps with the help of Gemini for Education

payload.title: Gemini app for jetlag assistance
payload.fact: Google launched the Gemini app to help users avoid jetlag during faraway trips.
supporting_evidence: Gemini app can help you avoid jetlag so you can make the most of your visit

payload.title: Google AI tools for job search
payload.fact: Google offers AI tools including Career Dreamer, NotebookLM, and Gemini Live to assist with resumes, cover letters, and interview preparation.
supporting_evidence: Use Google AI tools — like Career Dreamer, NotebookLM and Gemini Live — for resumes, cover letters, interview prep and more

payload.title: Gemini used by parents for daily tasks
payload.fact: Google's Gemini helps parents with homework, meal planning, and other tasks.
supporting_evidence: How Gemini helps with homework, meal planning and more, so parents have time to focus on the good stuff

payload.title: Google AI tools for education
payload.fact: Google launched AI tools designed to help educators support teaching goals and provide personalized learning experiences.
supporting_evidence: Google’s AI tools help educators support their teaching goals and provide personalized experiences to help students learn

payload.title: Google announced new education AI tools at ISTE 2026
payload.fact: Google made announcements regarding education AI tools at the ISTE 2026 conference.
supporting_evidence: The latest announcements from Google for Education at ISTE 2026

payload.title: Google.org funding for education and AI partners
payload.fact: Google.org announced new funding at the 2026 ISTE conference to support two long-term partners in education and AI.
supporting_evidence: We are announcing new funding at the 2026 ISTE conference to support two long-term partners

payload.title: June Demand Gen Drop for YouTube campaigns
payload.fact: Google launched the June Demand Gen Drop offering new ways to improve campaign performance and engage viewers on YouTube.
supporting_evidence: Our June Demand Gen Drop offers more ways to elevate campaign performance and engage new viewers on YouTube
